title: Requirement entity (ONT-E-06)
description: An engineering requirement (functional / safety / performance / environmental / interface). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref. Pitfall #1 lock: unevaluatedProperties: false (NEVER additionalProperties: false). Pitfall #9 lock: $schema = JSON Schema Draft 2020-12. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. Locked to 'Requirement' for this entity type.

requirement_text.description: The normative requirement text in canonical form. ≥20 chars to reject placeholder stubs.

requirement_type.description: Requirement classification. Drives downstream verification routing (e.g. safety → DO-178C/DO-254 evidence; performance → flight-test/CFD).

jurisdiction.description: Optional. Set ONLY when this requirement is regulatory in nature (i.e. derived from a RegulationClause). See ontology/vocabularies/jurisdictions.yaml (Plan 10) for canonical labels.

parent_artifact.description: Optional. URI of the artifact this requirement is on (AircraftSystem / Subsystem / Component / Standard / RegulationClause / etc).

traceability_id.description: Optional cross-system identifier (e.g. DOORS object ID, Jira issue key, internal req-tracker tag).
